response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role — a severe seniority mismatch that creates high flight-risk and compensation misalignment. Java is listed only as a skill with minimal recent hands-on use (primarily TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang dominate recent roles), and German proficiency is only Basic, falling short of the strong German requirement for client-facing insurance consulting work.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with strong software craftsmanship, TDD, and agile experience
Berlin-based with EU work history, eliminating relocation and authorization friction
Demonstrated teaching, workshop, and mentoring ability valuable in team settings
concerns: Massive seniority overshoot — staff/senior engineer applying for entry-level position
German is only Basic, but role requires strong verbal and written German for insurance clients
Java is a peripheral skill; recent stack is TypeScript/Node/DLang with no evidence of recent Java production work

key_factors.factor: Berlin location and EU work history
